title: Customers With Positive Revenue
description: Find customers who had positive revenue in year 2021.
constraints: revenue can be negative, zero, or positive
The table contains data for multiple years — filter to 2021 only
key_concept: Simple WHERE filter on multiple conditions.

hints.L1: Filter the Customers table for year = 2021 and revenue > 0.
hints.L2: SELECT customer_id FROM Customers WHERE year = 2021 AND revenue > 0.
hints.L3: SELECT customer_id FROM Customers WHERE year = 2021 AND revenue > 0

optimal_solution: SELECT customer_id FROM Customers WHERE year = 2021 AND revenue > 0;
